metadata.title: SYNGO_CC_4046
metadata.comment:
Rationale: Dvl1 was detected in Liquid chromatography-mass spectrometry results of LDCVs.
Figure 3B: Post-embedding immunogold (inset) staining against Dvl1 displays localisation on the surface of LDCV.
Figure 4: Dvl1-myc was transfected in PC12 cells, immunostaining demonstrates Dvl1 localisation on vesicular structures indicating that Dvl1 is a vesicular protein.
Figure 3A and S2D: Fzd8 immunoreaction was present on LDCVs and did not colocalise with SP or CGRP (DCV markers) indicating that LDCVs might have another subset that does not have SP or CGRP.

18/01/2021 Dnyanada: The paper does not provide any information on the specificity of the antibody used.. Experimental description: No mention of mouse strain used ...Authors were contacted for retrieving this information (15/05/2020 Dnyanada, xu.zhang@ion.ac.cn)
